{{Infobox religious building
| name = Nakamiya Shrine
| native_name = 中宮神社
| mapframe = yes

| mapframe-wikidata = yes

{{nihongo|'''Nakamiya Shrine'''|中宮神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Hida Province]].

== instance of (P31) ==

* {{ill|Shinto shrine|en|Shinto shrine|ja|神社|de|Shintō-Schrein|zh|神社|fr|Sanctuaire shinto|ru|Дзиндзя|WD=Q845945}}

* {{ill|Shikinai Shosha|en|Shikinai Shosha|ja|式内小社|WD=Q134917287}}
* {{ill|Kokuhei-sha (Engishiki Jinmyocho)|WD=Q135160342}}
* {{ill|Engishiki seat|WD=Q135018062}}
* {{ill|Junior Fifth Rank|ja|従五位|zh|從五位|WD=Q11071125}}
* {{ill|Kokuhei Shosha (Engishiki)|WD=Q135206465}}

* {{ill|List of Shikinaisha in Hida Province|ja|飛騨国の式内社一覧|WD=Q11665887}}

{{nihongo|'''Nakamiya Shrine'''|中宮神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Hida Province]].

{{nihongo|'''Nakamiya Shrine'''|中宮神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Hida Province]].

{{nihongo|'''Nakamiya Shrine'''|中宮神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Hida Province]].

{{nihongo|'''Nakamiya Shrine'''|中宮神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Hida Province]].

{{nihongo|'''Nakamiya Shrine'''|中宮神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Hida Province]].
